CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALHOUN BROTHERS GRADING & PAVING, INC. ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CALHOUN BROTHERS GRADING & PAVING, INC'S MOTION TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENY WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ON 9/8/10, THE COURT STAYED THIS ACTION PENDING ARBITRATION. MOVING PARTY HAS FAILED TO SEEK RELIEF FROM THAT STAY OR EXPLAIN WHY IT WOULD BE APPROPRIATE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT IN LIGHT OF THE ONGOING ARBITRATION.
